author: ep0ch-nc
name: RPS
description: Play rock paper scissors against the bot with buttons, quick text, or best-of-N mode. Tracks per-user stats.
install_msg: Loaded. Try `[p]rps` for buttons or `[p]rps rock` for quick play.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores per-user RPS win/loss/tie counts keyed by Discord user ID. Data removed on `[p]rpsreset` or via Red's data deletion requests.
